title: KBFPCL Plant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited
short_info: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL) Recruitment 2026: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited has released the official notification for 1 Plant Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: MVSc Graduate in Livestock Products Technology, BVSc Graduate
qualification.details: Plant Manager: MVSc Graduate in Livestock Products Technology (min 1 year exp desirable) or BVSc Graduate (min 2 years exp) in Industrial Poultry Processing/Abattoir Management.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.keralachicken.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KBFPCL Plant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the KBFPCL Plant Manager position is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Plant Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MVSc Graduate degree in Livestock Products Technology with at least 1 year of experience, or a BVSc Graduate degree with at least 2 years of experience in Industrial Poultry Processing or Abattoir Management.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Plant Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Plant Manager post is 35 years. No minimum age limit is specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Plant Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Plant Manager position will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. The application fee is Nil for all candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Plant Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Plant Manager post will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the KBFPCL Plant Manager Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Plant Manager in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Plant Manager position is Contractual.
